TLPL830 Seminar in English Education (3 Credits) Credit Only Granted for. EDCI840 or TLPL830. Formerly: EDC1840.

TLPL841 Research Methods in Reading (3 Credits)

Current research questions and methods culminating in a study suitable for submission to journals. Emphasis on using and conducting research. Credit Only Granted for. EDCI861 or TLPL841.
